name_cn:
Chane1 New 24K Hobo Shoulder Bag
Purchased at the counter for 46200rmb~
24K thick chain hobo bag, stunning looks! Small lambskin feels great, love it! Soft and smooth
Wearing the double C strap with the thick chain adds more fashion flair
Retro yet stylish, easy to match any style, effortlessly creating a casual relaxed vibe, lightweight and super comfortable!!
Hardware: Thick plated 24k vintage gold
Leather: ZP small lambskin
Dimensions: 14*21*7cm
Model: AS5174
